meaning: n.古时的小型竖琴,小型立式钢琴
examples: But the spinet was too big for me to play.
His nails resemble the ivory keys of the spinet.
One afternoon, when I was better, I played the spinet.
" McDermott banged a schoolhouse Everett spinet piano (with a recently revived low A key) into submission in another Morton classic, "Grandpa's Spells.
